displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Preparing noodle:
1. Boil water and put CJ Sweet Potato Noodle (100g) in the boiling water for 8 minutes
2. Take out the boiled noodle and drain water from the noodle
3. Rinse in the cold water in order to make for more elastic taste
• Preparing dish:
1. Wash and rinse all vegetables
2. Chop & slice it to preferred size
3. Heat frying pan with oil
4. Stir fry pork and garlic
5. Put in CJ Sweet potato noodle
6. Put in all vegetables and sesame oil in pan
7. Put CJ BBQ Sauce 60g (Original: Soy sauce base, others: Chili base)
8. Stir fry for 3 minutes
9. Serve on plate and put some sesame seeds on the top of dish
10. Ready to eat

metaData.Ingredients:
• Noodle (88.1%): Potato Starch (46%), Wheat Flour (22%), Palm Oil (12%), Wheat Gluten, Salt, Emulsifier [Lecithin (E322)], Soybean Oil, Acidity Regulator [Potassium Carbonate (E330)], Water, Thickener [Guar Gum (E412)], Green Tea Flavour Oil
• Soup (10.3%): Salt, Flavour Enhancer [Monosodium L-Glutamate (E621), Disodium 5'-Ribonucleotides (E635)], White Sugar, Soy Sauce Powder, Artificial Beef Flavour, Palm Oil, Radish Powder, Yeast Extract Powder, Garlic Powder, Onion Powder, Black Pepper Powder, Red Pepper Powder, Roasted Sesame, Oleoresin Capsicum Coating Powder, Garlic Flavor Oil
• Flake (1.6%): Dried Chives, Dried Carrot, Dried Onion, Dried Oak Mushroom, Dried Red Pepper
• Allergen advice: Contains wheat, gluten. soybean and sesame
• Manufactured in a facility that also processes fish, egg, milk and shellfish

offers.description: Buy 1 Nongshim Sweet Potato Glass Noodles @ $4.35

metaData.Key Information:
• Suitable for stir fry
• Goes well with seafood, meat and vegetables

metaData.Preparation:
1. Put vermicelli in boiling water for about 5 to 7 minutes
2. When vermicelli are cooked, drain away the water
3. Fry ingredients of your choice eg. meat, seafood, vegetables, etc in hot pan then add vermicelli and fry evenly
4. Season to taste and serve

metaData.Preparation:
• For cooking:
Cook organic udon in rapid boiling water for 10 minutes (salt or oil is not needed)
• For stir-fry:
1. Cook orgainic udon in rapid boiling water for 8 minutes (noodles will receive extra cooking in the wok)
2. Drain and rinse well with cold water
3. Drain again
